neighborhoods.name: Old Town / Castle Area
neighborhoods.description: Historic center around the medieval castle with narrow streets, craft shops, and the old port

housing.predominantType: Renovated apartments in stone and colonial buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Limassol. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Germasogeia
neighborhoods.description: Tourist area east of center with the hotel strip, Dasoudi Beach, and residential neighborhoods behind
neighborhoods.character: Beach suburban, tourist infrastructure, green spaces
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Limassol's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Mesa Geitonia
neighborhoods.description: Central residential area with local character, traditional shops, and lower rents than the coast
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Limassol Marina / Molos
neighborhoods.description: Modern marina development and waterfront promenade with luxury residences and international dining

housing.predominantType: Luxury marina apartments and modern tower residences

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
